author.title: Sam Sacks
author.description:
Sam Sacks is a political commentator and journalist.


Sam is the host of Means Morning News, Means TV's daily anti-capitalist news & analysis show.


Sam is also co-founder and host of The District Sentinel where they release a weekly podcast and the District Sentinel Weekly Newsletter via Substack. Learn more about The District Sentinel.


Sam worked as a staffer for a member of the US House of Representatives during the 111th Congress, advising on issues ranging from election reform to government oversight to ethics investigations.


Upon leaving Capitol Hill before the 2010 elections, Sam went to work as a senior producer for RT’s The Big Picture with Thom Hartmann.


He was a routine guest on the show, and often filled in as host. He also produced RT’s live Third Party Debate between Dr. Jill Stein and Gary Johnson in November of 2012. And he co-anchored RT’s live election night coverage.
